ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name or title of the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the simulation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Link to a project for better organization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the simulation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the simulation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the simulation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., temperature, pressure) */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter used in the simulation */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value the parameter can take */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value the parameter can take */,
  "step_value" REAL /* Step value for incremental changes */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Whether the parameter is required for the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this data belongs to */,
  "time_sec" REAL /* Time in seconds at which data was recorded */,
  "x1" REAL /* Value of parameter x1 at this time */,
  "x2" REAL /* Value of parameter x2 at this time */,
  "x3" REAL /* Value of parameter x3 at this time */,
  "x4" REAL /* Value of parameter x4 at this time */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Link to the parameter for better identification */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data point is valid */,
  "measurement_error" REAL /* Error or uncertainty in the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the platform (e.g., engineer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the simulation */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation accessed */,
  "access_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., create, view, update, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this result pertains to */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary or description of the result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was generated */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the result */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the result */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the result was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this metadata belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., version, author) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value associated with the key */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., system, user) */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Whether the metadata is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_metadata_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation where the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Message describing the error */,
  "error_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error occurred */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code for easier reference */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the error has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the error */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the error was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_errors_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_simulations" (
  "project_simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-simulation link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the simulation */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_simulations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_simulations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified timestamp */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Whether the report is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data used in the report */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES time_series_data ("data_id")
)
